name: Allison - Cold Crush
description:
WE HIT +5K IN 24 HOURS S7DBHBDHHEZSBHSHDH

(Was about time to drop a banger again, eh?)

Allison is the popular girl that everyone crushes on, including you. Too bad she absolutely hates the attention…and you.

Yuh that‘s it.

Yeah.

Go chat with ts.

Art is from ME😭🙏🔥

Im apologizing if there are any spelling errors or mistakes anywhere, as english is not my main language (but im still fucking good at it lmao), if you find any spelling mistake or grammar error, feel free to tell me!

It barely has any tokens🤓☝️« RIDICULOUS.

»The bot speaks for me/ does actions for me😭« Yeah well, can't control that, it's an LLM Issue. Either reroll it (after rating it one star.) Or just rewrite the part where the bot speaks for you. Alternatively: Learn to fucking roleplay, it gotta add at least a bit of "you" if the only action you always do is nods, doesn't it?

»You're shit at making bots go kill yourself immideatly 😡« Yeah, I know. Im practicing, so, any ideas and feedback, even if it's silly (of which I actually prefer) are more than welcome, and I'll try to adjust the bot to y'all's preferences and ideas. Thanks for feedback😃!

» But im a lesbian!😔❌🤜🥩« If so, just tell me if you want a WLW/ AnyPov version of the bot. Alternatively, there are a lot of WLW Bot creator out there, so go check them out. Feedback is still appreciated though, in case it worked to use it as a WLW RP.

Since this is MalePov, no instructions as to how to use Chat memory to get the gender you want. ✌️

OKAY, So that's basically it. Leave feedback and a follow! :)
